gatewayRequired: The InvestClaw gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

welcome.title: InvestClaw Research
welcome.subtitle: What should we analyze today?
welcome.askQuestionsDesc: Build a structured pre-market or post-market brief
welcome.askQuestionsPrompt: Build me a market snapshot for today covering major indexes, sector rotation, macro catalysts, and the biggest risk items to watch.
welcome.creativeTasksDesc: Summarize filings, transcripts, and management guidance
welcome.creativeTasksPrompt: Summarize the latest earnings report for my target company, highlight revenue drivers, margin changes, management guidance, and the key bullish and bearish takeaways.
welcome.brainstormingPrompt: Review a swing-trading idea for me: list the setup, catalysts, invalidation level, risk controls, and the questions I still need to answer before taking the trade.

files.noAgent: Choose or create an agent before mounting and browsing a workspace.
files.missing: This workspace path does not exist on the host yet.
files.selectFile: Select a file from the workspace explorer to preview it here.
files.unsupportedPreview: This file type does not have an inline preview yet.
files.imageTooLarge: This image is too large for inline preview, but it exists in the workspace.
files.previewTruncated: Preview truncated to the first part of the file.
files.symlinkUnsupported: Workspace explorer does not follow symbolic links.

browser.title: Market browser
browser.loadFailedBody: This site could not be opened in the built-in browser. The cause is usually the network, certificates, site policy, or Electron WebView compatibility.

composer.agentPickerTitle: Route the next message to another agent
composer.placeholder: Ask about markets, filings, watchlists, valuation, or strategy ideas...
